mapper.select: SELECT fs.id, fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.order_number as "orderNumber", fs.customer_id as "customerId", fs.customer_name as "customerName", fs.carrier, dca.carrier_name as "carrierName", fs.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", fs.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.delivery_attempts as "deliveryAttempts", fs.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", fs.actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", fs.current_location as "currentLocation", fs.from_address as "fromAddress", fs.to_address as "toAddress", fs.weight, fs.dimensions, fs.delivery_instructions as "deliveryInstructions", dg.city as "destinationCity", dg.state as "destinationState", dg.country as "destinationCountry", fs.created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_shipments fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_carrier dca ON fs.carrier = dca.carrier_code LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_geography dg ON fs.destination_pincode = dg.pincode WHERE fs.id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.fact_shipments GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT fs.id, fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.carrier, dca.carrier_name as "carrierName", fs.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", fs.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.current_location as "currentLocation", fs.created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_shipments fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_carrier dca ON fs.carrier = dca.carrier_code WHERE fs.carrier = #{carrier} AND fs.state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_shipments WHERE state_id IN ('PENDING', 'LABEL_CREATED')

SELECT fs.id, fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.carrier, dca.carrier_name as "carrierName", fs.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", fs.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.current_location as "currentLocation", fs.created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_shipments fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_carrier dca ON fs.carrier = dca.carrier_code WHERE fs.state_id IN ('PENDING', 'LABEL_CREATED') ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT fs.id, fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.carrier, dca.carrier_name as "carrierName", fs.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", fs.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", fs.actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", fs.current_location as "currentLocation" FROM hm_query.fact_shipments fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_carrier dca ON fs.carrier = dca.carrier_code WHERE fs.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT fs.id, fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.carrier, dca.carrier_name as "carrierName", fs.tracking_number as "trackingNumber", fs.shipping_method as "shippingMethod", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", fs.actual_delivery_date as "actualDeliveryDate", fs.current_location as "currentLocation", fs.delivery_attempts as "deliveryAttempts", dg.city as "destinationCity", dg.state as "destinationState" FROM hm_query.fact_shipments fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_carrier dca ON fs.carrier = dca.carrier_code LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_geography dg ON fs.destination_pincode = dg.pincode WHERE fs.tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}
